titleStmt.title: SII 8.265: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 265. (A.R. No. 660 of 1902). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE MANDAPA OF THE ANAIKATTA-PERUMAL TEMPLE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koṟcaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīIrācarācaṉ cuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3vatu siṁhanāyaṟṟu Amarapakṣattu Aṣṭamiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Urocaṇi nāḷ kiṭāmpi śrīnārasiṁhapaṭṭaṉeṉ nila vilaipramāṇam teṉpuṟaṇi Irācarācavaḷanāṭṭuveṇṭāḻaināṭṭu vākūruṭaiyāṉ meykkuntevar makaṉār cokkanāyaṉār vicaiyakaṇṭakopālaṟku nila vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu . Iṟṟaināḷ Ivaṟku nāṉ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivūr piṭākai kaḷappāḷ cuttavallinallūr 3 10 4 + 1/80 +1/160 coḻaṇukkanallūr 10 5 + ra + 1/20 + � +
1/20 Āka 5 10 + 1/20 + 1/80 Iṉṉilam Aimpatumāk kāṇiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmi licainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭunaṟkāciṉāl 1000 5 100 Ippaṇam Āyirattu Aiññūṟum Āvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟi kaiccilavaṟa kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta Innilattu meṉokkiṉa maraṅkaḷum kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟukaḷum pākamum pākāśrayaṅkaḷum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Urimaikaḷu makappaṭa viṟṟukkuṭutta Innilattukku Ituve vilaiyāvutākavum Ituve poruḷmāvilaiyākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷmāvaṟutip poruḷcilavolai kāṭṭakkaṭava tallavākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup
poruḷaṟa kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ cokkanāyaṉār vicaiyakaṇṭakopālaṟku kiṭāmpi śrīnārasiṁhapaṭṭaṉeṉ . śrīnārasiṁhapaṭṭaṉ taṟkuṟiyāṉamaikku Ūrkkaṇakku kuḻalūruṭaiyāṉ karumāṇikkāḻvāṉeṉ Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi yaṟiveṉ piḷḷai ten tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉeṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉāṉa naraciṅkapaṭṭaṉeṉ Ippaṭi yaṟiveṉ Āṉatirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉpaṭṭaṉeṉ . Ippaṭi yaṟiveṉ cāṇṭilaṉ varatarācapaṭṭaṉeṉ Ippaṭi yaṟiveṉ viḷattūruṭaiyāṉ Eṟutiruvuṭaiyāṉeṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ veḷḷainallūruṭaiyāṉeṉ .
Inta cātaṉattiṉpaṭi palarum pramāṇam paṇṇukaiyil palarpakkalilum ko ṇṭatāvatu cātaṉam Oṉṟiṉāl koṇṭi varatarācapaṭṭaṉpakkal koṇṭa piṭākai cuttavallinallūr 3 10 5 kku 1000 5 10 Ippaṇam Āyirattu Aimpatukku nila muppattañcu māvum Ivvāṇṭu kaṉṉināyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu tritiyaiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa vicākattu nāḷ kāṟkiyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉpaṭṭar pakkal koṇṭa cuttavallinallūr 3 + 1/160 + 1/2 cuttavallinallūr coḻaṇukkanallūr 4 10 8 + 1/160 + 1/2m coḻaṇukkanallūr 5 + 1/160 + 1/320 Āka 5 10 7 + 1/320kku 1000 7 100 Ippaṇam Āyirat

Another piece belonging to this inscription reads as follows:
llūr coḻaṇukkanallūr 6 + 1/160 tam Irāyūr coṭṭai tiruvaṭikaḷpaṭṭar pakkal koṇṭuṭaiye
ṉāṉa cuttavallinallūr coḻaṇukkanallūr 3/64 + 1/160m piṭākai coḻaṇukkanallūr 1/2 + 1/2 + �� + 1/160m
koṇṭi varatarācapaṭṭarpakkal koṇṭuṭaiyeṉāṉa cuttavallinallūr coḻaṇukkanallūr
1/5 + 1/160m Āka 2 100 8 �kku 6 1000 2 100 5 10 Ippaṇam Āṟāyirat tirunūṟṟu Aimpatukkum Ā
Digital edition of SII 8.265 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
